description: You are a Wind Energy Development Manager overseeing a portfolio of utility-scale wind farm projects. The ENERGY schema in Oracle (Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=energy_mgr, Password=Energy2024) contains project data for 8 wind farms from the EIA-860 database. Resolve data integrity issues in the MILESTONES table by correcting out-of-order dates to follow the logical sequence: Site Assessment -> Environmental Review -> Permitting Approved -> Financial Close -> Construction Start -> Grid Interconnection -> Construction Complete -> Commercial Operation, while preserving the overall project timeline span. Create a hierarchical view named PROJECT_HIERARCHY_VW showing the organizational hierarchy (Portfolio, Region, Project, Phase, Milestone) including LEVEL, SYS

contaminated_projects: Shepherds Flat (845MW) - Construction Complete before Permitting
Alta Wind (1548MW) - Commercial Operation before Grid Interconnection
Roscoe (781.5MW) - Financial Close before Environmental Review
Horse Hollow (735.5MW) - Grid Interconnection before Construction Start
